name: Pathmark Local App Windows
release: v0.6.79 Navigation restore and dashboard progress cleanup

release_notes: After login, Pathmark Online is the landing tab while top-level navigation remains available. Dashboard progress tiles no longer repeat the same completion text above the progress bar.
